creator: mjguzik@gmail.com
text:
In section Examples, one can find the following line:
devfs rule -s 20 add major 53 group games

but:
# devfs rule -s 20 add major 53 group games
devfs rule: unknown argument: major

Fix: Proposed patch is attached.

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: Run `devfs rule -s 20 add major 53 group games'.
